task:
OBJECTIVE: Create /Users/srini/Projects/Kommit/app/dashboard/page.tsx

Build a dashboard page with:

1. Auth gate — on load, call /api/auth/me. If no user, show login modal. If user, show dashboard.

2. Login modal (shown when not authenticated):
- Email input + "Send code" button
- After sending, show 6-digit code input + "Verify" button
- On success, reload to show dashboard

3. Dashboard (shown when authenticated):
- Nav with KO icon linking home (clears session on click), email shown top right, logout button
- Page title: "Your commitments"
- List of commitments from /api/commitments/list
- Each commitment card shows:
  - THE TRUTH (label + text)
  - YOUR COMMITMENT (label + text)  
  - STAKE (amount formatted as $X.XX)
  - DUE DATE (formatted)
  - Status badge: ACTIVE (yellow #ffde59, dark text) / FOLLOWED THROUGH (dark bg, white text) / OVERDUE (red border)
  - If ACTIVE: "I followed through" button (dark bg, white text, full width)
- Empty state: "No commitments yet. Start with what's weighing on you." with link to /

4. Design: white background, Inter 14px, same card style as rest of site (border 1px solid #e4e4e4, borderRadius 8px, padding 20px 24px)

5. Add logout route — clicking logout calls /api/auth/logout which clears the cookie, then redirects to /

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/Kommit/app/dashboard/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Auth gate works
Login modal shows email + OTP flow
Dashboard shows commitments list
Status badges present
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/Kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: use ast.parse
